subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Though afflictions and calamities, hardships and tribulations have encompassed thee from every side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله هر چند مصائب و رزایاء و متاعب و بلایاء از جمیع انحا بر شما استیلا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
